# polaris_principal_role_assignment (Resource)

Assigns a principal role to a Polaris principal.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "polaris_principal" "alice" {
  name = "alice"
}

resource "polaris_principal_role" "data_engineer" {
  name = "data-engineer"
}

resource "polaris_principal_role_assignment" "example" {
  principal      = polaris_principal.alice.name
  principal_role = polaris_principal_role.data_engineer.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `principal` (String) The name of the principal. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `principal_role` (String) The name of the principal role to assign. Changing this forces a new resource.
